title: Fiskars Kitchen Scissors, Total Length: 18 cm, Steel/Synthetic Material, Classic, 1000819, Standard
features: Universal scissors (blade length: 6.8 cm) for cutting several layers of different materials, Suitable for right-handed as well as for hands of different sizes
Comfortable grip and firm hold thanks to ergonomically shaped handles made of synthetic material
Fast and clean working thanks to long stainless steel blades, Strong teeth stabilize the material that is to be cut, Adjustable blade tension
Made in Finland: High durability, easy cleaning - dishwasher safe
Contents: 1x Fiskars kitchen scissors, Classic, Dimensions: Cutting blade length: 6.8 cm, Total length: 18 cm, Weight: 74 g, Material: Steel/synthetic material, Colour: orange, 1000819
description: From the manufacturer At a glance: For right-handed users Ergonomically shaped handle Finnish design Dishwasher safe Kitchen scissors With adjustable blade tension The sturdy Fiskars kitchen scissors should not be missing from any household. They are ideal for cutting several layers of different materials. They can be used by right-handed users with hands of different sizes. The ergonomically shaped handle made of high-quality plastic offers a firm hold and a pleasant grip. The long stainless steel blades in combination with the adjustable blade tension allow a fast and clean working. In addition, the cutting material is fixed by the strong serrated blade. For professional and amateur gardeners Whether weeding, planting flowers, chopping trees, sweeping or clearing snow: the versatility of Fiskars is impressive all year round. For every season and every need, Fiskars offers the ideal tool to work easily and effectively. In addition, Fiskars products not only impress with their intelligent design but also with their durability. Cooking made easy Fiskars offers a tool for every task: peeling, cooking, chopping, grating, mixing, softening... Fiskars kitchen utensils allow you to spend a pleasant time in the kitchen. Nothing will stop you from spoiling your loved ones. Crafting for everyone Let your creativity run wild. Fiskars handicraft tools will help you make creative magic. Fiskars lets you make embroidery, quilting, cards and scrapbooks, customize accessories and start interior decoration projects. No matter whether you are an enthusiastic beginner or a trained professional, with Fiskars tools you are always well prepared. Made in Finland Fiskars has stood for quality and innovation since 1649, and our axes have chopped millions of logs. Our knives have cut millions of slices of bread. Our scissors have cut millions of metres of fabric - with outstanding success.
